backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the insurance backend, handling quote submissions, user profiles, business info, and admin-only access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts the old actor state (Map-based quotes and user profiles) to the new schema (Set-based user profiles, simplified persistent quotes array), dropping legacy quote data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Jenkins public site, agent login link, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of every component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Jenkins Insurance Agency site with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, Schema.org InsuranceAgency structured data, and Montserrat/Open Sans Google Fonts.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router app defining all routes: the public Jenkins site at '/', admin login at '/admin', and a protected admin layout with eight child routes for dashboard, quotes, reviews, content, contact, service areas, analytics, and settings.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Renders an 'About Johnathan' section with a headshot, credentials list, and three value proposition cards (Independent Agent, Local Expert, Personalized Service).
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAnaly: An admin dashboard analytics page showing KPI cards and two Recharts visualizations: a lead conversion funnel bar chart and a monthly revenue line chart.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAppoi: Displays a table of all quote/appointment submissions fetched via the useGetAllAppointments hook, showing name, phone, coverage type, city, and date.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Renders the main admin dashboard with static stat cards (leads, quotes, calls, policies), a leads chart, a policy pie chart, and a recent leads table.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminJenki: Shows website analytics for the Jenkins insurance site with static stat cards, a monthly quote requests bar chart, a coverage-type pie chart, and a city breakdown table.
Admin form for editing and saving Jenkins contact information (phone, email, address, hours, WhatsApp) to localStorage with toast feedback.
Admin page with collapsible sections for editing Jenkins website content (hero, about, contact, coverage) stored in local state, with save functionality and toast notifications.
Jenkins-specific admin dashboard displaying static stat cards, a leads table with status management, and a CSV export feature for lead data.
Defines the main admin layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, header with date/notifications, and session-based auth guard that redirects unauthenticated users to /admin.
Admin page for managing insurance quote leads with filtering, sorting, status updates, and notes editing, persisting data to localStorage.
Admin page for managing customer reviews with add/edit/delete functionality, star rating selector, and localStorage persistence.
Admin page for managing service area cities with toggle enable/disable, add custom cities, remove non-default cities, and save to localStorage.
Admin settings page with sections for agent profile, notification toggles, website/social links, and password change, all persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Defines the admin portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation (desktop and mobile drawer), nav items for all admin sections, and a logout button using the useAdminAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLeadA: Renders a table of mock leads with dropdowns to assign each lead to one of four predefined agents, showing toast notifications on assignment.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLeads: Simple page wrapper that renders the LeadsTable component under a 'Leads Management' heading.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Modal dialog for admin login with username/password fields; authenticates with a hardcoded password ('admin123') and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
Full-page admin login form with a password field and show/hide toggle; uses the same hardcoded password check and sets sessionStorage on success before redirecting.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPDFIn: Displays a table of mock invoices with status badges and generates printable HTML invoice documents in a new browser window when the print button is clicked.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPolic: Renders a table of mock client policies with ID, type, status badges, and premium amounts, plus a placeholder 'New Policy' button.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetti: Admin page for editing business settings (name, phone, address, etc.) with inline field editors that fetch and update values via admin query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/Appointmen: Monthly calendar component that displays appointments from a list of quote submissions, color-coded by coverage type, with month navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/LeadsChart: Line chart showing daily lead volume for the past 7 days using static mock data and Recharts with a dark theme.
frontend/src/components/admin/LeadsTable: Filterable, searchable leads table with status filters, CSV export, and optional compact mode, rendered from mock lead data with a dark theme.
frontend/src/components/admin/PolicyPieC: Donut pie chart displaying policy mix by coverage type (Auto, Home, Life, Commercial) using static data and Recharts with a dark theme.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProtectedA: Route guard that redirects unauthenticated users to the home page by checking sessionStorage for an admin authentication flag.
Multi-step appointment booking component with a month calendar, time slot selection, a contact form, and a confirmation screen using the useCalendarBooking hook.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section with a quote request form (name, phone, email, zip, coverage type, call time) that submits via the useSubmitQuote hook, alongside static contact info.
frontend/src/components/EmotionalCloseSe: Dark-themed CTA section showcasing an admin panel preview image and urgency-driven copy ('Only 3 spots left') with benefit icons and a scroll-to-contact button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCallButt: Fixed floating call button that reads the phone number from useBusinessInfo and renders a tel: link with a pulsing style.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button that builds a wa.me link from the business WhatsApp number via useBusinessInfo and opens it in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer combining an urgency strip, contact proof bar, brand info, service links, and social icons, with ProcessProofSection rendered above it.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll nav links, phone CTA, agent login button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a Houston skyline background, headline targeting Conroe insurance agents, trust-point checklist, and CTA buttons to scroll to contact or call.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonC: Section displaying four insurance coverage types (Auto, Home, Life, Business) as icon cards with descriptions and quote links, styled for the Houston landing page.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonF: Footer for the Houston/Conroe insurance landing page including business contact info, service areas, coverage types, and a portfolio pitch banner.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonH: Hero section for a Houston/Conroe insurance broker landing page, displaying a trust badge, headline, description, star rating, CTA buttons, and an agent photo using business info from a custom hook.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonQ: A quote request form for Houston insurance leads with fields for name, phone, email, city, coverage type, and preferred call time, submitting via a custom mutation hook and showing a success state on completion.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonT: Displays three hardcoded customer testimonials with star ratings and a Google Reviews summary widget for a Conroe/Houston insurance broker.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonW: A 'Why Choose Us' section highlighting three value propositions (personal service, local expertise, 24/7 claims help) with icons and images for a Houston independent insurance agent.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsA: About section for agent C. Jenkins featuring a photo, bio text, and stats (years experience, families served, carriers, rating), with content loaded from localStorage and an intersection-observer fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsB: A Spanish-language outreach section advertising bilingual insurance services in Greater Houston, with content loaded from localStorage and a CTA button linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsC: Displays a grid of insurance carrier partner name badges (e.g., Progressive, Travelers) with a fade-in animation triggered by an intersection observer.
Displays a 6-card grid of insurance coverage types (homeowners, auto, business, etc.) with scroll-triggered fade-in animations and content overridable via localStorage.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsF: Renders a fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner with a tooltip, linking to a pre-filled WhatsApp chat for insurance quote requests.
Site footer with three columns covering agency branding/contact info, quick navigation links, and a list of served Houston-area cities, plus social media icons and copyright.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsH: Fixed navigation header with scroll-shadow effect, desktop nav links, a phone CTA, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu for the Jenkins Insurance site.
Full-screen hero section with animated headline, subheadline, CTA buttons, and trust badges; content is customizable via localStorage with sensible defaults.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsQ: Contact/quote section with a multi-field lead form that submits data to an ICP actor and saves it to localStorage, alongside a contact info sidebar loaded from localStorage defaults.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsR: Displays a customer reviews section with star ratings, pulling from localStorage or default reviews, with scroll-triggered fade-in animations and a Google rating summary.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsS: Renders a fixed mobile bottom bar with two buttons: a phone call link and a WhatsApp chat link, visible only on small screens.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsT: Displays an animated statistics trust bar with count-up numbers for families insured, star rating, carrier partners, and cities served, triggered on scroll into view.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsW: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Jenkins Insurance' section with scroll-triggered fade-in animations highlighting the independent agent advantage, local expertise, and speed.
frontend/src/components/MapSection.tsx: Section displaying the business address with a placeholder map area that instructs developers to replace it with a Google Maps embed.
frontend/src/components/ProcessProofSect: Three-step process section (Figma Mockup → Live Preview → Google #1 Conroe) with screenshot cards, fallback image handling, and step number badges.
frontend/src/components/ReevesAboutSecti: About section featuring agent Johnathan Reeves' photo and credentials alongside an auto-advancing testimonial carousel with navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/ReevesCalendarSe: Scheduling section with a Calendly embed placeholder showing integration instructions and a fallback direct-call CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ReevesCarrierBad: Displays a grid of four partnered insurance carrier badges (State Farm, Allstate, Geico, Progressive) with color-coded initials and A+ ratings, using an IntersectionObserver for a fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/ReevesContactSec: Renders a contact/quote request form with fields for name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and message, handling submission via the useReevesQuoteSubmission hook and showing success/error states.
frontend/src/components/ReevesFooter.tsx: Site footer displaying the business brand, licensing disclaimer, social media links, contact details, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice, pulling dynamic data from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesHeader.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the RIS logo, desktop nav links, a phone CTA, a free-quote button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu, using business info from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesHeroSectio: Full-screen hero section with a headline, subtext, CTA buttons for a free quote and scheduling a call, and trust-signal stats, featuring a fade-in animation on mount and dynamic business info.
frontend/src/components/ReevesServicesSe: Displays a grid of five insurance service cards (auto, home, life, health, business) with icons, descriptions, and highlights, animating cards into view sequentially via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/ReevesWhyChooseS: Displays a 4-card 'Why Choose Reeves Insurance Solutions' section with animated scroll-in cards highlighting 24/7 support, best rates, local expertise, and A+ carriers using a dark blue gradient background.
Renders a grid of 6 insurance service cards (auto, home, life, business, health, retirement) with icons, benefits lists, and a scroll-to-contact CTA button.
frontend/src/components/StickyQuoteBar.t: A mobile-only fixed bottom bar with a green gradient 'Get Quote' button that scrolls to the contact section when clicked.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: A carousel-style testimonials section displaying 5 client reviews with navigation controls, star ratings, and a carrier logo strip on a dark background.
frontend/src/components/TrustBar.tsx: A horizontal stats bar showing four trust indicators (carrier partners, families served, Google rating, years experience) with icons in a cream-colored section.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: A section with scroll-fade animations embedding a YouTube video about AI in insurance, with decorative corner accents and a dynamic city-based heading.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays four stat-driven reason cards (carrier partners, claims support, families served, Google rating) on a dark green gradient background to highlight the agency's differentiators.
frontend/src/contexts/ToastContext.tsx: Provides a React context for displaying auto-dismissing toast notifications (success, error, info) with enter/exit animations and a manual close button.
frontend/src/data/mockLeads.ts: Defines TypeScript types and exports a static array of 12 mock insurance leads with fields for name, phone, email, policy type, status, and date.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Custom hook providing simple session-storage-based admin authentication with hardcoded credentials, exposing login and logout functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching quote submissions from the ICP backend and reading/writing business info key-value pairs from localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useBusinessInfo.ts: Aggregates all business info fields by calling useGetBusinessInfo for each key and returning them with fallback default values for a generic insurance agent.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarBooking.ts: Provides a custom hook for managing appointment booking with predefined time slots (9 AM–5 PM, excluding lunch), simulated booked slots, and functions to check availability and simulate booking an appointment.
frontend/src/hooks/useHoustonQuoteSubmis: Custom hook that exposes a React Query mutation for submitting Houston insurance quote form data to the backend actor, invalidating the quoteSubmissions cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles and quote submissions, with aliases for admin use cases.
frontend/src/hooks/useReevesQuoteSubmiss: Custom hook that exposes a React Query mutation for submitting Reeves Insurance quote form data to the backend actor, mapping zipCode to the city field.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a visibility flag when a referenced element scrolls into view, enabling scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for the Jenkins/Reeves brand color system, and declares keyframe animations and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/HoustonDemoPage.tsx: Page component that assembles the Houston insurance demo landing page by composing Houston-specific section components including hero, why-us, coverage types, testimonials, quote form, and footer.
frontend/src/pages/JenkinsPublicSite.tsx: Public-facing Jenkins Insurance Agency site page that composes all Jenkins-branded section components, sets SEO metadata, and initializes scroll-fade IntersectionObserver animations on mount.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static privacy policy page for Reeves Insurance Solutions with a branded header, back-navigation link, and structured policy sections covering data collection, usage, and legal terms.
frontend/src/pages/PublicSite.tsx: Main public-facing site page for Jenkins Insurance Agency, composing all section components (Header, Hero, TrustBar, Services, etc.) with an admin login modal toggle.
frontend/src/pages/ReevesPublicSite.tsx: Public portfolio site page for Reeves Insurance Solutions, composing all Reeves-branded section components with floating action buttons and a sticky quote bar.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom Jenkins brand colors, fonts (Montserrat, Open Sans), shadows, border radii, and accordion animations with typography and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Jenkins Insurance Agency demo site product, including architectural notes, agent details, service cities, known issues, and existing feature inventory.
